name: Jack Elliott
description: American television and film composer, conductor, music arranger, and television producer (1927-2001)
abstract: Irwin Elliott Zucker (August 6, 1927 – August 18, 2001) was an American television and film composer, conductor, music arranger, television producer, and co-founder of the New American Orchestra, later renamed the American Jazz Philharmonic.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Rowles
about_quotes.evidence: I think my favorite conductor in Los Angeles is Jack Elliott. I've played for under ... Earl Fagin

about_quotes.speaker: George Masso
about_quotes.evidence: Jack Elliot was one of the arrangers and one of my roommates.
about_quotes.doc_title: George Masso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Findley
about_quotes.evidence: We were in back with the orchestra with Jack Elliott and Allyn Ferguson. And we did it live at Studio 8H in New York.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Findley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 6, 2023
